recruitable.name: Ria the Summoner
recruitable.description: A powerful summoner whose eidolons can turn the tide of battle.

recruitable.name: Valka the Valkyrie
recruitable.description: A divine warrior whose judgment cuts through darkness itself.

recruitable.name: Drake the Dragoon
recruitable.description: A dragoon knight whose aerial attacks rain down from the heavens.

recruitable.name: Rex the Lionheart
recruitable.description: An immortal king blessed by the gods themselves, wielding divine authority.
